name: Benson Henderson
winProfile: 1 Elite+ wins, 4 Top-5+ wins, 9 ranked quality wins.

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Canonical UFC-only prime endpoint for this fighter audit.

shortCase: Four UFC title-fight wins and elite lightweight depth, capped by close decisions, a low finish rate, and four prime losses.
bestArgument: Henderson pairs a 10-4 UFC record with three successful lightweight defenses and one of the deepest schedules in the division.
counterArgument: Several signature wins were razor-close, he rarely finished opponents, and the Pettis, Thomson, dos Anjos, and Cerrone losses all occurred while he was elite. WEC is excluded.
whyRankedHere: Henderson pairs a 10-4 UFC record with three successful lightweight defenses and one of the deepest schedules in the division.
whyNotHigher: Several signature wins were razor-close, he rarely finished opponents, and the Pettis, Thomson, dos Anjos, and Cerrone losses all occurred while he was elite. WEC is excluded.
finalTakeaway: Four UFC title-fight wins and elite lightweight depth, capped by close decisions, a low finish rate, and four prime losses.
